description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:2.5.1 Docker image and a postgres:latest service, with POSTGRES_DB and POSTGRES_USER variables set for the database. Add a cache for vendor/ruby. Define a before_script that runs apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq postgresql postgresql-contrib libpq-dev cmake, ruby -v, which ruby, gem install bundler --no-ri --no-rdoc, copies config/database.ci.yml to config/database.yml, runs RAILS_ENV=test bundle install --jobs $(nproc) "${FLAGS[@]}", and writes the master key to config/master.key. In the default test stage add a rails job that executes RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rake db:create db:schema:load. Also add an rspec job that runs RAILS_ENV=test bundle exec rspec, both inheriting the before_script and using the same image and service.
